description: Make a strong impression on potential employers with this sleek and modern email template. Ideal for individuals in the human resources field, this template presents your curriculum vitae in a clean, professional, and simple manner. The design features a unique zig zag pattern that adds a modern touch to your CV. It's not just visually appealing but also well-structured, ensuring your key skills and experiences are easily noticeable. Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting your career, this template will help you stand out in the competitive job market. Make your CV as impressive as your credentials with this contemporary design.
short_description: Elevate your job application with our modern, clean curriculum vitae template. Perfect for HR professionals, it showcases your skills and experiences in a unique zig zag layout. Not just a resume, it's your next career milestone.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.

html_data:
Anna Jones

 

Copywriter

 
 

Contact

 
  • 0874 254 658
  • 42 Street, City, Country
  • example@example.com
 

About Me

Versatile copywriter, delighting clients for over five years with crisp copy and tangible business results. Inquisitive and quick to get to the heart of a product, translating even the most technical of features into solid customer benefits.

Experience

 

Copywriter - Brilliant Paint

2016 - Present

A small, but innovative paint company struggling to increase market share in a field dominated by three major players. Hired to revamp existing copy in marketing materials.

* Increased response rate to direct mail letter by 20%

* Improved in-store brand recognition by 40% through slogan

* Retained by client when sales doubled in one month

Freelance Copywriter

2016 - 2013

* Write advertising copy designed to effectively reach customers in the appropriate target markets to promote products and services.
* Discuss products and services with clients to learn all the details and specifications to ensure the appropriate advertising methods are used.

* Create engaging content for internet/web, publication, and broadcast media using creative concepts.

* Research what aspects will make products and services more appealing to customers to maximize the number of sales.

 

Education

BA in Advertising

2013

Washington State University

Skills

 
  • Exceptional writing skills
  • Strong customer service skills
  • Outstanding creative thinking skills
  • Organised
  • Team player

style.font-family: Open Sans, Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
